ksa_text: Manage test data for AI systems, including test data generation, validation, sensitivity analysis of test cases, and protection of sensitive test data.

dcwf.top_element_label: Perform risk assessment whenever an AI application or AI-enabled system undergoes a major change, when emergent behaviors are detected, and/or unintended consequences are reported.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

top_anchors.element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.
Perform risk assessment whenever an AI application or AI-enabled system undergoes a major change, when emergent behaviors are detected, and/or unintended consequences are reported.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-T-005 (Risk Management/Task) scores 0.497 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.497). Scope is edge_case for Algorithmic Trading Engineer: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Risk Management, composite 0.497. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Risk Management for Algorithmic Trading Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk Management appears in ~50% of Algorithmic Trading Engineer postings as secondary competency. Risk quantification and risk-adjusted return modeling in senior ATE profiles. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for edge-case inclusion at 50% market penetration.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Risk Management without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. Risk Management without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
